response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video: 00:00-03:28 was spoken content about Monet, 03:29-05:00 was a vocal performance. 2. Identified song title 'Around the World' and composers from on-screen text in the performance segment. 3. Searched for 'Around the World Monkey Majik lyrics'. 4. Found complete lyrics in both English and original language from letras.com and oricon.co.jp. 5. Mapped scenes and created the JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video begins with the performer explaining the artwork 'The Water-Lily Pond' by Claude Monet. This is followed by a full vocal performance of the song 'Around the World' by Monkey Majik.

scenes.description: The performer discusses the painting 'The Water-Lily Pond' by Claude Monet. No vocal music is playing.
The performer performs the song 'Around the World' by Monkey Majik. On-screen text credits Maynard/Blaise/tax for lyrics and composition.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Every night I look to the skies and wonder what we did
Always a naive point of view that breaks us in the end
If I could find the meaning of it all I'd take the chance
Maybe in time we'll walk the mile and change it if we can

It's now and always (how did we get this far, did we get this far now?)
Always (we're making a brand new start, just a brand new start now)
Always (nothing will hold me down, never hold me down now)
Always (wave goodbye to me!)

Around the world atarashii kotoni
Around the world fumidasu chikara de
Around the world sekai wa kawaru sa
But don't run away 'cause if it's not ok!
I'll change that world into something better honey!
